title: astragalus infestus
intro: Astragalus infestus, also known as Ononitis or Desert Milkvetch, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Astragalus infestus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and fatigue, making it a popular herb for overall well-being. Astragalus infestus can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance vitality and longevity.
